commands: vite run hello#build # should build the library
ls packages/hello/dist # should have the library
vite run hello#build # should hit cache
vite run array-config#build # should build the library supports array config
ls packages/array-config/dist # should have the library
vite run array-config#build # should hit cache
vite run default-config#build # should build the library supports default config
ls packages/default-config/dist # should have the library
vite run default-config#build # should hit cache
